'''damoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabbability|tabbability]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-m-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabbability|tabbability]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| damoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæmeketh|dæmeketh]] || [[word:dæmekej|dæmekej]] || [[word:dæmekesh|dæmekesh]] || [[word:dæmeke|dæmeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:damomokoth|damomokoth]] || [[word:damomokoj|damomokoj]] || [[word:damomokosh|damomokosh]] || [[word:damomoko|damomoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:damokoth|damokoth]] || [[word:damokoj|damokoj]] || [[word:damokosh|damokosh]] || [[word:damoko|damoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:damofkoth|damofkoth]] || [[word:damofkoj|damofkoj]] || [[word:damofkosh|damofkosh]] || [[word:damofkof|damofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:damokotho|damokotho]] || [[word:damokojo|damokojo]] || [[word:damokosho|damokosho]] || [[word:damokoko|damokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:damokoth|damokoth]] || [[word:damokoj|damokoj]] || [[word:damokosh|damokosh]] || [[word:damoko|damoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:damokothol|damokothol]] || [[word:damokojol|damokojol]] || [[word:damokoshol|damokoshol]] || [[word:damokokol|damokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:damokothotho|damokothotho]] || [[word:damokojojo|damokojojo]] || [[word:damokoshosho|damokoshosho]] || [[word:damokoko|damokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:damokothon|damokothon]] || [[word:damokojon|damokojon]] || [[word:damokoshon|damokoshon]] || [[word:damokokon|damokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:damokothoro|damokothoro]] || [[word:damokojoro|damokojoro]] || [[word:damokoshoro|damokoshoro]] || [[word:damokokoro|damokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
